programmes.show_description: OJ is live through the night from the Salford Riviera with Midnight Mastermind, Wish You Were There and another dial of the Midnight Caller phone.

programmes.show_name: Alternative Sounds of the 90s with Dermot O'Leary
programmes.show_description: Dermot pays tribute to the places which gave us bands like The Verve, Blur and The Manics.
Welcome! It's Early Breakfast with Owain Wyn Evans, featuring Airdrum Anthems.
Gary has your morning sorted with showbiz guests and music to get you up and out!
Vernon explores the BBC archive in Vernon's Vault and two listeners take on the mid-morning music quiz Ten To The Top. Plus, Mike Pickering chooses two more Tracks Of My Years.
Jeremy and guests discuss the news headlines and talk to the people making them.
Trevor is bringing you some of the best music from across the decades to get you through the afternoon.
Sara gets you through teatime with plenty of giggles and some fab music. Plus, Totally Teavoted, the SARA Awards, Alphabest and Hatched, Matched and Dispatched.
Sara plays the biggest and best tunes to get you up dancing!
Jo brings her Shiny Happy Playlist, 30 minutes of feel-good music from 7-7.30pm to soundtrack listeners' weekday evening.
Jo shares session tracks and messages from superstar producer Jack Antanoff's band Bleachers, recorded at the BBC's Maida Vale studios!

programmes.show_name: The Country Show with Bob Harris
programmes.show_description: Bob plays some of his favourite country songs of all time including tracks from Carly Pearce, Hank Williams and Brothers Osborne.

programmes.show_name: The Good Groove with DJ Spoony
programmes.show_description: Feel-good dance floor favourites to make you groove, and DJ Spoony hits the decks for a live mix!
Connor Phillips is live through the night from the Salford Riviera with Midnight Mastermind, Wish You Were There, Midnight Caller and a huge Ravio 2 to end the week.

programmes.show_name: Dance Sounds of the 90s with Vernon Kay
programmes.show_description: Vernon unearths some long forgotten dance gems from the 90s... Expect tunes you haven't heard in ages to unlock those memories of the best decade in dance!
Welcome! It's Early Breakfast with Owain Wyn Evans, featuring Airdrum Anthems.
OJ's got your Good Friday morning sorted... with Jack Savoretti and new music!
Gary looks back on this day in music history in 'De Ja Woo'; there's the mid-morning music quiz Ten To The Top and Mike Pickering chooses his final two Tracks Of My Years.
Tony sets the bank holiday mood with three hours of the very best soul and disco music - including tracks from Chic, Olivia Dean, Diana Ross, MT Jones, Sister Sledge and more.
Mark Goodier presents his essential selection of the finest 'billion streamers' from the past six decades of rock and pop.
The Reverend Kate Bottley reflects on the loss, faith and hope found in the Easter story.
Angela Griffin has the perfect playlist for a Good Friday night, to help you unwind.
